note: Curated REALITY donor-SNI candidates. PUBLIC hostnames only. The node bootstrap picks ONE at random per node and verifies it at runtime (openssl s_client -groups x25519 -tls1_3 must negotiate TLSv1.3) before committing it. No secrets, IPs, or locations live here. License is documented in nodes/dataplane/README.md (pure JSON carries no header).

selection.require: TLSv1.3 negotiated AND X25519 group AND HTTP/2 (h2) ALPN where offered
